Operation 'getList' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. Original summary and description are overly generic and provide no actionable context. Improved version specifies the retrieval action, clarifies the required parameter (list_id), and describes the expected response structure to help AI agents understand what data will be returned.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific list by its ID. Returns the list object containing metadata such as name, description, subscriber count, and creation date. Requires the list_id parameter to identify which list to retrieve.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are overly generic and provide no actionable context. Improved version specifies the retrieval action, clarifies the required parameter (list_id), and describes the expected response structure to help AI agents understand what data will be returned.

message: Operation 'addSubscribers' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable, but description lacks critical details about input format, response structure, and side effects. Enhanced description specifies what inputs are expected, what the operation returns, and clarifies the state change (subscribers are immediately added and eligible for campaigns).

data.description_suggestion: Adds one or more subscribers to a specified list. Accepts a list of user identifiers or email addresses in the request body. Returns confirmation of added subscribers and any errors for invalid entries. Subscribers are immediately added to the list and will be included in future list-based messaging campaigns.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description lacks critical details about input format, response structure, and side effects. Enhanced description specifies what inputs are expected, what the operation returns, and clarifies the state change (subscribers are immediately added and eligible for campaigns).
